title: DiscordLoom
description: Create a direct link between your Minecraft and Discord servers with DiscordLoomConnect, ensuring only whitelisted players have access.
body:
DiscordLoom is a mod designed to merge the diverse functionalities of Discord with the Minecraft server whitelist, enhancing the efficiency of administrative actions.

The main focus of DiscordLoom is to facilitate efficient integration of the gaming and communication platforms, ensuring that only authorized, whitelisted players can access the server, hence providing a secure and cooperative gameplay environment.

## Key Features 

- **Discord Role Synchronization:** This mod allows for the automatic syncing of roles between Discord and LuckPerms. For instance, if a player is promoted to a new role on Discord, they will also receive this new role in LuckPerms.

- **Mandatory Voice Channel:** DiscordLoom also features a mandatory voice channel requirement, ensuring that all whitelisted players are also part of the voice chat in Discord which further promotes cooperation and communication.

- **In-Game Link Process:** All necessary linking processes are integrated in-game, making it easy for players to connect their Discord accounts with their respective Minecraft server accounts.

- **Ban sync:** Minecraft banned players get banned also on discord. BanHammer is also supported

In the future, it will also link the Discord chat to offer a more immersing experience.

**Required Mods**

- [SERVER] LuckPerms: for the enhanced functionality of permissions management. 

Experience a whole new gaming environment with DiscordLoomConnect, where communication and gameplay overlap for a better gaming experience.
